heading: Programme Requirements
text_blocks: Bachelor of Engineering (Computer Engineering), BEng(CEG) Academic Year 2025/26 and after Course Requirements Units Common Curriculum Requirements 40 Singapore Studies (GE) - CDE2501 Sustainable Systems for Liveable Cities (renamed wef Sem 2, AY25/26) 4 Cultures and Connections (GE) - GEC 4 Communities and Engagement (GE) - C&E 4 Critique and Expression (GE) - ES2631 Critique and Communication of Thinking and Design 4 Digital Literacy (GE) - CS1010 Programming Methodology 4 Data Literacy (GE) - GEA1000 Quantitative Reasoning with Data OR equivalent 4 Design Thinking - DTK1234 Design Thinking 4 Maker Space - EG1311 Design and Make OR EG1311BE 4 Artificial Intelligence - EE2211 Introduction to Machine Learning OR EE2213 Introduction to Artificial Intelligence 4 Project Management - PF1101A Project Management and Finance 4 Major Requirements 80 Engineering Core 20 MA1511 Engineering Calculus 2 MA1512 Differential Equations for Engineering 2 MA1508E Linear Algebra for Engineering 4 EG2401A Engineering Professionalism 2 Internship via CP3880 ATAP OR EG3611A IA OR equivalent 10 CEG Discipline Core 60 CG1111A Engineering Principles and Practice I 4 CG2111A Engineering Principles and Practice II 4 CS1231 Discrete Structures 4 CG2023 Signals & Systems 4 CG2027 Transistor-level Digital Circuit 2 CG2028 Computer Organization 2 CG2271 Real-time Operating System 4 CG3201 Machine Learning and Deep Learning 4 CG3207 Computer Architecture 4 CS2040C Data Structures and Algorithms 4 CS2107 Introduction to Information Security 4 CS2113 Software Engineering & Object-Oriented Programming 4 EE2026 Digital Design 4 EE4204 Computer Networks 4 Integrated Project - CG4002 Computer Engineering Capstone Project OR Final Year Project (FYP) over two semesters via CG4001/CP4106/EE4002D/EE4002R or CDE4301/A 8 Unrestricted Electives 40 CEG Technical Electives Build Your Own Degree Second Major in Innovation & Design Specialisation(s) e.g. Internet of Things (IoT), Industry 4.0. Apply at the end of Year 2/fourth semester. To view a brief description of a course, including its pre-requisites and semester(s) it is being offered in, please use the search engine at NUSMods . * Please note the semester in which CG-coded courses are offered: Course Semester With effect from CG1111A 1 AY2021/22 CG2111A 2 AY2021/22 CG2023 2 AY2017/18 CG3201 2 AY2025/26 CG3207 1 AY2011/12 CDE4301/A is administered by Engineering Design and Innovation Centre (EDIC) . AY2025/26 and after AY2021/22 to AY2024/25 AY2017/18 to AY2020/21
